## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? Keep it tight. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new capability for users or downstream consumers
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — build, tooling, repo hygiene
- [ ] refactor — behaviour-preserving code change
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] test — tests added or improved
- [ ] ci — CI configuration changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch rebased onto latest `main`.
- [ ] `make lint test` passes locally.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive` is a no-op (if terraform touched).
- [ ] `docs/data_contracts/` updated (if schema or contracts changed).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased` (if user-facing).
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages.
- [ ] No secrets committed.

## Verification

<!-- How did you verify this works? Tests added? Screenshots? -->

Closes #
